seoTitle: How to Bulk Send Emails Using Brevo
metaDescription: Send high-volume email campaigns in Brevo safely, from verifying sending domains to segmenting your audience and running final QA before launch.
intro: Sending a large-scale product announcement or promotional blast to thousands of subscribers risks tripping spam filters or exceeding sending limits if it's not set up correctly. Brevo's delivery infrastructure combined with proper domain authentication and audience segmentation helps you send bulk campaigns without hurting your deliverability.

steps.heading: Verify your sending domains
steps.body: Confirm your core sending domains are properly authenticated to ensure peak inbox delivery before running a bulk send.

steps.heading: Write a strong subject line
steps.body: Craft a high-impact subject line, since this affects open rates significantly at scale.

steps.heading: Build a responsive layout
steps.body: Drop in responsive column designs using the drag-and-drop builder so the email displays correctly across a wide range of devices.

steps.heading: Apply dynamic contact inclusion logic
steps.body: Use audience categorization and segment rules to determine exactly which contacts should receive the bulk send.

steps.heading: Run QA tests and commit the schedule
steps.body: Send final test previews to check formatting, then commit your broadcast schedule once everything checks out.

faq.question: Will bulk sending get my domain flagged as spam?
faq.answer: Proper domain authentication and following data compliance filters significantly reduce this risk compared to sending from an unverified domain.

faq.question: Is there a daily sending limit for bulk campaigns?
faq.answer: Sending limits vary by your Brevo plan, so check your specific tier's daily server limits before planning a very large send.

faq.question: How do I avoid emailing the wrong audience in a bulk send?
faq.answer: Use Brevo's audience categorization tools to apply dynamic contact inclusion logic and confirm your segment before sending.

faq.question: Should I test a bulk campaign before sending it to everyone?
faq.answer: Yes, running a final dashboard QA test with a preview send helps catch layout or content issues before committing to the full broadcast.
